17_288.name: New Vincentia (St Kitts/Nevis/Statia)
17_288._note: S95 #2: vex 1.5->1.0 (above-sea height *1/1.5). True 1x per peak_y=63+peak_m/9.14*vex (peak_m=1156 -> 189.5). Less steep volcanic relief.

23_887.name: Bahamas (San Salvador/Rum Cay)
23_887._note: S104 flat-island variation (V13 walk 'super flat'): mid/high anchors raised (64.8/66.8/69.0 -> 68.0/72.0/75.0) so the platform interior rolls ~Y65-75 instead of a Y64 pancake; peak 71.8->78.0, still a low coral platform (loyalty-islets reference tops at 77.5). Pairs with the S104 ROLLING dome + SOFT lift_cap_y=78 in render_islands BANDS (the old hard clamp mesa'd the tops at exactly Y74). Anchors at frac<=0.25 pinned at pre-S104 values (COASTLINE PIN: the land test mcy>63.4 crosses at the same frac as the walked V13 coastline; raising the low band flooded shallow offshore banks -- grand_turk land 56k->409k px in a trial bake). All added variation lives in the frac 0.25-1.0 segment.

18_299.name: Anguilla / St Maarten + outliers
18_299._note: S104 flat-island variation (V13 walk): ~75% of the land sat at frac<0.25 -> a Y64-66 pancake (audit p50=64.5 p75=65.8) even though St Maarten's hills reach ~130. The 0.25-0.5 segment steepened (66.1/76.9 -> 69.0/81.0) so the limestone platform rolls ~Y64-69; TRUE peak 132.6 UNCHANGED (hills stay hills, no new mountains). Anchors at frac<=0.25 pinned at pre-S104 values (COASTLINE PIN: the land test mcy>63.4 crosses at the same frac as the walked V13 coastline; raising the low band flooded shallow offshore banks -- grand_turk land 56k->409k px in a trial bake). All added variation lives in the frac 0.25-1.0 segment.

10_941.name: La Tortuga
10_941._note: S104 flat-island variation (V13 walk): DEM has real frac spread (0.27-0.86) but the old curve squashed it to Y64-69 (audit p50=65.9). Mid/high anchors raised (64.8/66.8/69.0 -> 68.5/73.0/76.0) toward the loyalty-islets read: land rolls ~Y64-77; peak 71.8->78.5, still a low arid carbonate platform. Anchors at frac<=0.25 pinned at pre-S104 values (COASTLINE PIN: the land test mcy>63.4 crosses at the same frac as the walked V13 coastline; raising the low band flooded shallow offshore banks -- grand_turk land 56k->409k px in a trial bake). All added variation lives in the frac 0.25-1.0 segment.

11_863.name: Los Roques (atoll)
11_863._note: S104 flat-island variation (V13 walk): half the land sat below Y65.3. Mid/high anchors raised (66.6/70.9/75.4 -> 69.0/74.0/77.5) for rolling ~Y64-78 rims + cays; peak 81.1->82.0 (atoll stays low). Anchors at frac<=0.25 pinned at pre-S104 values (COASTLINE PIN: the land test mcy>63.4 crosses at the same frac as the walked V13 coastline; raising the low band flooded shallow offshore banks -- grand_turk land 56k->409k px in a trial bake). All added variation lives in the frac 0.25-1.0 segment.

21_395.name: Grand Turk / Caicos
21_395._note: S104 flat-island variation (V13 walk): flattest target -- nearly all land at tiny frac, so the spline alone can't bite; the relief comes from the S104 ROLLING height_gain=9 dome (lift_roll_amp 0.45, cell-128 world noise) + SOFT lift_cap_y=76 in render_islands BANDS. Mid/high spline anchors raised (64.1/65.4/66.8 -> 65.5/68.5/71.5) so what DEM spread exists reads; peak 68.5->76.0. Net interior ~Y65-77 gentle undulation. Anchors at frac<=0.25 pinned at pre-S104 values (COASTLINE PIN: the land test mcy>63.4 crosses at the same frac as the walked V13 coastline; raising the low band flooded shallow offshore banks -- grand_turk land 56k->409k px in a trial bake). All added variation lives in the frac 0.25-1.0 segment.

-20_529.name: Ouvea atoll
-20_529._note: S104 flat-island variation (V13 walk): raised coral atoll was a Y64-66 pancake (audit p50=64.3 p75=65.6). Mid/high anchors raised (64.8/66.8/69.0 -> 68.0/72.5/75.5) -> rolling ~Y64-76 (loyalty-like); peak 71.8->78.0, atoll stays low. Anchors at frac<=0.25 pinned at pre-S104 values (COASTLINE PIN: the land test mcy>63.4 crosses at the same frac as the walked V13 coastline; raising the low band flooded shallow offshore banks -- grand_turk land 56k->409k px in a trial bake). All added variation lives in the frac 0.25-1.0 segment.
